mapper.select: select count(*) from sys_user where name like concat(#{keyword}, '%')
select count(*) from sys_user where status = #{keyword}
select count(distinct u.id) from sys_user u join sys_user_role ur on ur.user_id = u.id join sys_role r on r.id = ur.role_id where r.code = #{keyword}

select u.id, u.account, u.name, group_concat(r.code order by r.id separator ',') role, u.status, u.created_date from sys_user u left join sys_user_role ur on ur.user_id = u.id left join sys_role r on r.id = ur.role_id group by u.id, u.account, u.name, u.status, u.created_date order by u.id asc limit #{start}, #{end}

select u.id, u.account, u.password, u.name, group_concat(r.code order by r.id separator ',') role, u.status, u.created_date from sys_user u left join sys_user_role ur on ur.user_id = u.id left join sys_role r on r.id = ur.role_id where u.account = #{keyword} group by u.id, u.account, u.password, u.name, u.status, u.created_date

select u.id, u.account, u.name, group_concat(r.code order by r.id separator ',') role, u.status, u.created_date from sys_user u left join sys_user_role ur on ur.user_id = u.id left join sys_role r on r.id = ur.role_id where u.name like concat(#{keyword}, '%') group by u.id, u.account, u.name, u.status, u.created_date order by u.id asc limit #{start}, #{end}

select u.id, u.account, u.name, group_concat(r.code order by r.id separator ',') role, u.status, u.created_date from sys_user u left join sys_user_role ur on ur.user_id = u.id left join sys_role r on r.id = ur.role_id where u.status = #{keyword} group by u.id, u.account, u.name, u.status, u.created_date order by u.id asc limit #{start}, #{end}

select u.id, u.account, u.name, group_concat(r.code order by r.id separator ',') role, u.status, u.created_date from sys_user u join sys_user_role ur on ur.user_id = u.id join sys_role r on r.id = ur.role_id where r.code = #{keyword} group by u.id, u.account, u.name, u.status, u.created_date order by u.id asc limit #{start}, #{end}
mapper.insert: insert into sys_user (account, name, password, status, created_date) values (#{account}, #{name}, #{password}, 'ACTIVE', now())
insert into sys_user_role (user_id, role_id) select #{userId}, id from sys_role where code = #{roleCode}
